title: Zoto Spec System Config
description: Configuration for `.zoto/spec-system/config.yml`. Unknown top-level keys are allowed for forward compatibility.

unitOfWork.description: Term used for work items in user-facing messages (e.g. `spec`, `prp`, `task`, `story`).

specsDir.description: Directory where spec folders are created, relative to the repository root.

workDir.description: Directory monitored by hooks for unprocessed items, relative to the repository root.

sessionStartNudge.description: Session-start nudge when `workDir` contains enough unprocessed items.

enabled.description: When true, the session start hook checks item counts under `workDir`.

threshold.description: Minimum item count before the nudge fires.

spec.description: Spec execution limits and verification policy.

adversarialVerification.description: When true, adversarial verification is mandatory before closing the spec.

extensions.description: Optional integrations layered on the core workflow.

enabled.description: When true, memory tooling may attach contextual memories to spec flows.

plugin.description: Name of the memory plugin to load, or null to disable plugin binding.

subagents.description: Per-role defaults for spawned subagents (token budget and optional model override).

aggregator.description: Live status aggregator that rolls per-subtask yml files into spec-root status outputs.

debounceMs.description: Debounce window before recomputing aggregate status.

outputs.description: Relative output paths under the spec directory for paired md/yml artifacts.

specStatusMd.description: Markdown file containing block markers (human view).

specStatusYml.description: Authoritative yml for aggregate status (machine view).

subagentRoleConfig.description: Token budget and optional model for a logical subagent role.

tokenBudget.description: Maximum tokens budgeted for this role when spawning work.

model.description: Optional explicit model slug; when omitted the host uses its default routing.
